brand.motto: Turn research work into a traceable route
brand.tagline: An AI research navigation system for papers, proposals, software copyright, and patents
brand.summary: Move complex research from conversation into evidence, review, and delivery

home.title: Wenjin
home.subtitle: From topic framing, search, and evidence organization to manuscript revision and final materials, Wenjin keeps the process, rationale, and candidate outputs visible for review.

features.title: Supported Work Types
features.subtitle: Different tasks, one route you can keep moving forward

pathCard.title: From intent to evidence to deliverables
pathCard.nextAction: Start evidence collection and structure planning
pathCard.note: The right Workbench shows traces, evidence tables, and review entry points while Chat handles intent and intervention.

stage5.title: Review & Delivery
stage5.update: Waiting to assemble final submission package

workflow.title: How It Works
workflow.subtitle: Sources, analysis, writing, and delivery in one continuous workflow

step1.title: Create Workspace
step1.description: Choose your project type and discipline, create a dedicated workspace.

step2.title: Conversational Guidance
step2.description: AI proactively learns your research direction, progress, and needs.

step3.title: Smart Research
step3.description: Systematic literature search, gap analysis, and research report generation.

step4.title: Iterative Writing
step4.description: Progress through outline, drafts, and revisions — every output is traceable.

step5.title: Final Delivery
step5.description: Compile, format to school or journal standards, and export.

cta.title: Put the next research task onto a route you can keep advancing
cta.subtitle: Create a workspace to organize sources, move the writing forward, and preserve the outputs.

philosophy.title: Why Wenjin Is Different
philosophy.subtitle: Academic writing isn't a one-shot generation task — it's a staged, iterative, and deeply personal process.

conversation.title: Conversation as Workflow
conversation.description: No forms, no buttons. Natural conversation drives all work. The AI proactively asks for what it needs and guides you step by step.

stages.title: Stage Awareness
stages.description: Every workspace has clear research stages — research, collection, structure, writing, review. The system knows where you are and suggests what's next.

singleThread.title: One Space, One Conversation
singleThread.description: Each workspace maintains a single persistent conversation. No thread management — AI uses summarization and long-term memory to keep context coherent.

artifacts.title: Artifact-Driven
artifacts.description: Every output — chapters, reviews, outlines — is persisted as a traceable artifact that accumulates into a research portfolio.

modes.title: Advance in Workbench, refine in Prism

writing.tagline: Visible runs: from intent to evidence chain
writing.description: Chat understands intent and starts or steers research Missions. The Mission Console opens on demand for progress, research members, evidence, and reviewable outputs.
writing.keywords: Run Trace · Evidence Table · Candidate Output Review

rewriting.tagline: Selection-based refinement: from manuscript to final draft
rewriting.description: Bring workspace outputs into the manuscript studio and move between editing, compile preview, local polishing, structural revision, and final delivery.
rewriting.keywords: Selection Refinement · Compile Preview · Review Sync

workspaceTypes.title: Five Academic Writing Scenarios
